arts.ttl: Barcelona complete ‘best deal in the history of football’
arts.sum: Barcelona have signed what president Joan Laporta claims is the “best deal in the history of a football club”. “It’s the best economic deal in the history of sports for teamwear,” he said as quoted by Mundo Deportivo .

arts.ttl: Barcelona v Atlético Madrid: La Liga – live
arts.sum: La Liga updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off in Spain Live scores | Tables | Fixtures | Men’s top 100 in 2024 Hansi Flick makes three changes to the side that was beaten at home by Leganes. Pau Cubarsi, Gavi and Fermin Lopez come in for Eric Garcia, Dani Olmo and the injured Lamine Yamal. Atleti make one change from last weekend’s win over Getafe. Conor Gallagher is back, Samuel Lino drops out. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Photo: Former Barcelona teammates reunite ahead of Atlético clash
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid star Antoine Griezmann was spotted in discussion with a former teammate from his time at Barcelona on Saturday evening. This, of course, comes as Barcelona and Atlético prepare…

arts.ttl: Official: Barcelona’s line-up to face Atlético, featuring two changes
arts.sum: The XI of players set to be depended upon by Barcelona for the club’s upcoming showdown with Atlético Madrid has been unveiled online. Barca, of course, are primed to return…

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal sends rallying cry to Barcelona fans ahead of Atlético matchup
arts.sum: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal has taken to social media on Saturday, to issue something of a rallying cry to the club’s supporters. This, of course, comes ahead of a crucial…

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs. Arsenal: European giants 'set to battle' for highly-rated Frenchman
arts.sum: Barcelona and Arsenal are reportedly both interested in signing Sevilla midfielder Lucien Agoume during next summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: ‘A special relationship with Hansi Flick’ – Bayern Munich star back in Barcelona’s sights
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona are once again keeping a close eye on developments surrounding the future of Bayern Munich star Leroy Sané. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have on…

arts.ttl: Landslide vote for Barcelona’s record-breaking $1.8 billion deal
arts.sum: A landslide vote at an Extraordinary General Assembly of Barcelona’s members has passed a record-breaking kit manufacturing agreement with Nike . Barcelona’s previous Nike deal was valued at $112 million per year, and was due to expire in June 2028.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs. Atletico Madrid: Catalan giants suffer late injury blow ahead of La Liga showdown
arts.sum: Barcelona will be without the services of Hector Fort for Saturday's La Liga clash against Atletico Madrid due to a hamstring problem.

arts.ttl: Barcelona chief speaks out on Nico Williams pursuit
arts.sum: Barcelona president Joan Laporta has this weekend provided a fresh insight into the club’s summer pursuit of Athletic Club star Nico Williams. The name of wide-man Williams, of course, took…
